title: Add WorldStateProjector.ApplySmeltComplete for real-time inventory updates
description:
SmeltCompleteEvent only completes the correlated action and logs; it does NOT update _worldState.Inventory with the smelted output items. The inventory is only refreshed on the next GetStatus/StatusEvent cycle, causing delayed goal completion (up to 2s). Add ApplySmeltComplete to WorldStateProjector that adds e.Result items to inventory, mirroring how BlockMinedEvent handles inventory updates.

Council confidence: 100%. Severity: Medium (P1).
